title: Гўв‚¬ЛњAssault on California continuesГўв‚¬в„ў: Governor Newsom sues Trump over illegal attempt to revoke stateГўв‚¬в„ўs clean air policies
content: California is suing the Trump administration for illegally attempting to revoke its authority to enforce stricter vehicle emissions standards under long-standing Clean Air Act waivers. Governor Newsom and Attorney General Bonta argue this rollback defies legal precedent and endangers public health, climate progress, and U.S. clean tech leadership. The move could cost California billions in health and economic damages while boosting ChinaГўв‚¬в„ўs dominance in electric vehicles.
author: Analysts Account
